name: codedna-plugin
description: CodeDNA orchestrates Codex coding work with requirement capture, reverse analysis, Project Genome, guardrails, task packs, diff review, repair tasks, outcome scoring, and layered local memory.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, guard, review, repair, score, and remember Codex coding tasks.
interface.longDescription: CodeDNA is a local Codex workflow plugin for complex coding work. It captures the user's Requirement Strand, generates a reverse Analysis Strand, builds a Project Genome, pairs both strands, blocks under-specified tasks, writes copy-ready Codex Task Packs, generates guardrails, reviews diffs for risk, creates focused repair tasks, scores outcomes, and evolves layered local memory without external AI APIs.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeDNA to prepare this coding task.
Generate a CodeDNA task pack for Codex.
Review this Codex result with CodeDNA.
